prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document discusses initiatives, programs, and policies specifically related to Deaf communities and British Sign Language (BSL) that are implemented and relevant to England, particularly highlighting developments in Derbyshire and the involvement of English government departments.
